strengths: 15+ years across full stack with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators aligns with required AI agent experience
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-equivalent ecosystems, Selenium courses, Fluent-Asserts library)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited demonstrated Kotlin experience; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms at Altom)
Cloud breadth shown mainly via AWS CDK at Optilyz; GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth not detailed
response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of polyglot fullstack experience with a strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and testing culture, plus current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly maps to a key requirement. Gaps around explicit Nest.js and current Kotlin usage exist but are bridgeable given the demonstrated language breadth and architectural maturity.
